positive: A minimalist line art depiction of a mountain range viewed through a single, perfect archway. The style should be highly abstract, utilizing negative space and delicate continuous lines, reminiscent of Japanese sumi-e ink wash painting. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo and white. Elegant, serene, clean design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, color fill, shading, clutter, photorealism
